sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: operating margin 46% vs 15% industry (extreme pricing power); gross margins 68% indicate premium pricing / low substitution

sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: premium gross margins 68% reflect brand/IP power; large revenue base (318B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: no clear network-effect indicators in available data

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins 68% vs 40% industry (massive cost advantage); operating margin 46% vs 15% (extreme efficiency); massive scale ($318B revenue) enables fixed-cost absorption

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: premium 68% gross margins sustained (high barriers); $100B+ revenue scale creates massive entry barrier

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Cost Advantage create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
